creator: dominik.lisiak@bemsoft.pl
text:
Major update from 2.8.3 to 2.9.4. The port has been almost completely redesigned.
This issue obsoletes bug #226465.

The port security/ossec-hids-client has been renamed to security/ossec-hids-agent.

The following svn command needs to be run on ports tree root before applying diff:
svn move security/ossec-hids-client security/ossec-hids-agent
